records.ety: [Formed from Hind. tā<?/ī the juice of the palmyra tree, popularly, toddy, fr. tā<?/ the palmyra tree, Skr. tāla.]

defs: A juice drawn from various kinds of palms in the East Indies; or, a spirituous liquor procured from it by fermentation.
A mixture of spirit and hot water sweetened.
notes: ☞ Toddy differs from grog in having a less proportion of spirit, and is being made hot and sweetened.
